overall.description: First-person walking sequence through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night. The character walks through a covered urban walkway beneath an overpass, exits onto a busy street lined with towering neon-lit buildings, and crosses a multi-lane intersection. The footage is from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077) featuring high-fidelity graphics with wet reflective surfaces and dense urban lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway beneath highway overpass

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered walkway, passing digital advertisements on the right and traffic on the left

notable_agents.action: lone pedestrian walking ahead in the distance under the overpass

entered.detail: dark concrete overpass ceiling with linear fluorescent lighting fixtures
illuminated purple advertisement display with 'SET SOUL FOR FLAVOR' text
green metal barrier separating walkway from lower level
wet gray concrete pavement with red painted boundary lines

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk through a covered urban walkway beneath a highway overpass. The environment is artificially lit by overhead fluorescent strips and glowing digital billboards on the right wall. Vehicles pass by on the left side of the barrier while the camera moves forward on the wet concrete sidewalk toward a distant exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: open downtown street with towering neon-lit buildings

events.description: exits the covered walkway into the open night air, revealing towering futuristic buildings and neon signage

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk toward a busy intersection, passing other pedestrians and observing the neon-lit cityscape

entered.detail: towering futuristic skyscrapers with illuminated windows and neon accents rising into the night sky
massive vertical digital advertisement showing a fashion model with 'JINGUJI' branding
various glowing storefront signs including cyan and purple neon lights
tall modern street lamps illuminating the wet pavement

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the covered walkway into an open downtown street lined with towering futuristic buildings. The scene is dominated by massive digital billboards and neon signage reflecting off the wet pavement. The camera continues walking forward along the sidewalk, approaching a busy intersection with increasing pedestrian activity.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with yellow-striped pedestrian crosswalk

events.description: steps onto the yellow-striped pedestrian crosswalk and begins crossing the multi-lane intersection
futuristic vehicles pass through the intersection from left to right while crossing

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection on the marked crosswalk, navigating between moving vehicles and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: futuristic yellow sedan driving through the intersection from left to right
pedestrian in red jacket walking ahead on the crosswalk

entered.detail: wide pedestrian crossing with bold yellow stripes and 'WALK' painted markings on wet asphalt
large illuminated advertisement displaying a burger with '37.7%' promotional text

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the intersection and steps onto the yellow-striped crosswalk, crossing the multi-lane road amidst moderate traffic. Futuristic vehicles pass by while the camera navigates across the wet asphalt. Massive digital billboards including the prominent JINGUJI advertisement tower overhead as the character completes the crossing toward the opposite corner.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a confined urban underpass into the expansive, neon-drenched heart of a futuristic city. It begins with a walk through a covered walkway beneath a highway overpass, moving past fluorescent strips and glowing billboards on a wet concrete sidewalk. As the camera reaches the end of the passage, the environment opens up into a towering downtown street where massive digital signage and neon lights reflect vividly off the rain-slicked pavement. The scene then shifts toward a busy intersection, with the camera stepping onto a yellow-striped crosswalk and navigating across the multi-lane road amidst flowing futuristic traffic. Finally, the movement concludes as the character crosses the wet asphalt under the glow of a prominent JINGUJI advertisement tower toward the opposite corner.
